---
name: Platform Request
about: Request support for a new platform
title: '[PLATFORM] '
labels: 'enhancement, platform'
assignees: ''
---

## 🌐 Platform Information

- **Platform Name**: [e.g. 抖音, 小红书]
- **Platform URL**: [e.g. https://www.douyin.com]
- **Platform Type**: [e.g. Video, Social, Shopping]

## 📋 Platform Features

What features would you like to see supported?

- [ ] Daily sign-in
- [ ] Points/currency collection
- [ ] Task completion
- [ ] Other: [describe]

## 🔐 Authentication Method

How does the platform authenticate users?

- [ ] Cookie-based
- [ ] Token-based
- [ ] Username/Password
- [ ] OAuth
- [ ] Other: [describe]

## 📸 Screenshots

If possible, add screenshots of the sign-in page or process.

## 🔍 Technical Details

<details>
<summary>API Endpoints (if known)</summary>

```
Sign-in endpoint: 
User info endpoint:
Other relevant endpoints:
```

</details>

<summary>Request/Response Examples</summary>

{
  "example": "data"

  "example": "response"

## 📊 Popularity

How popular is this platform? This helps us prioritize.

- [ ] Very popular (millions of users)
- [ ] Popular (hundreds of thousands of users)
- [ ] Moderately popular (tens of thousands of users)
- [ ] Niche (thousands of users)

## 🙋 Are you willing to help?

- [ ] I can provide API documentation
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with implementation
- [ ] I can provide test accounts (if allowed by platform)

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the platform request here.

## ⚠️ Legal Considerations

Is there anything we should know about the platform's terms of service or legal considerations?

- [ ] Platform allows automation
- [ ] Platform doesn't explicitly allow automation
- [ ] Unknown
- [ ] Other: [describe]
